enabled.label: Enable MusicBrainz
enabled.description: Master on/off for MusicBrainz enrichment. Optional; default off. No API key needed — MusicBrainz is an open service.

user_agent.label: User-Agent
user_agent.description: Identifies Phlix to MusicBrainz (their policy REQUIRES a descriptive User-Agent with contact info, e.g. a URL). Optional — the default is fine; customise if you run a fork.

rate_limit_delay.label: Rate-limit delay (ms)
rate_limit_delay.description: Minimum delay between MusicBrainz requests. Optional; default 1100 (MusicBrainz asks for no more than ~1 request/second).

auto_enrich.label: Auto-enrich
auto_enrich.description: Automatically enrich music items as they are scanned. Optional; default on.

fetch_album_art.label: Fetch album art
fetch_album_art.description: Pull cover art via the Cover Art Archive. Optional; default on.

fetch_acoustid.label: Fetch AcoustID
fetch_acoustid.description: Intended to use AcoustID audio fingerprints to improve matching. NOT YET IMPLEMENTED — the lookup needs a locally computed fingerprint the plugin does not produce, so this toggle currently has no effect.

search_depth.label: Search depth
search_depth.description: How hard to search for matches: fast, normal or deep. Optional; default normal.
